title: Wolfspeed Stock Soars As AI And Silicon Carbide Thesis Catches Fire
text: Wolfspeed Inc. (NYSE: WOLF) surged 11.37% on May 14, 2026, driven by upbeat earnings and strong demand signals. The stock nearly tripled from late April lows around $24.70 to close near $69.82, demonstrating significant momentum. A bullish research report from Citrini Research catalyzed the rally by highlighting Wolfspeed's strategic scarcity in silicon carbide manufacturing for the AI ecosystem. Though Q4 revenue guidance of $140M–$160M merely aligned with expectations, traders rewarded the company on its future growth narrative rather than current fundamentals. Financially, Wolfspeed remains early-stage with quarterly losses of approximately $119.9M, negative gross margins, and free cash flow around -$122.8M. However, the balance sheet shows strong liquidity with a current ratio of 6.5. The company strengthened its growth positioning through executive hires including regional leadership for Asia Pacific and enhanced legal and communications personnel. For active traders, this represents a textbook momentum play where narrative and volatility create opportunity, though the gap between the bullish story and current earnings losses warrants disciplined risk management.
